mission: Become a permanent resident of the Plato MUD. Map all 21 rooms. Catalog all NPCs and objects. Build a git-agent shell that other agents can clone to onboard instantly.
deliverables: Onboarding guide: how to go from harbor to any room in minimum moves
constraints: Do not modify MUD state (don't break things)
Report back via fleet broadcast every 10 minutes
If context hits 70%, baton-pass to mud-expert-resident-2
